message:
fix(codegen): Fail fast on OOM in generated collection operations

Fixed silent data loss in generated code patterns:
- enumerate() now panics on OOM instead of silently dropping items
- map() now panics on OOM instead of silently dropping mapped items
- list += items (aug_assign) now panics on OOM instead of silently dropping items
- setattr() in defer blocks now panics on OOM instead of silently failing

Files:
- src/codegen/native/builtins/collections.zig (enumerate, map)
- src/codegen/native/statements/assign/aug_assign.zig (list extend)
- src/codegen/native/builtins/dynamic_attrs.zig (setattr in defer)

All changed from `catch {}` to `catch unreachable` to fail loudly on allocation failures.
